name: qa-toolkit
description: AI-powered QA testing toolkit: 13 skills for exploratory testing, spec-based testing, regression testing, UX/security/accessibility audits, Playwright codegen, and Jira integration — all driven by Playwright MCP.

plugins.name: qa-core
plugins.description: Core QA workflow: exploratory testing, spec-based testing, test case design, regression testing, module testing, Playwright codegen. Works with any web app, with or without documentation.

plugins.name: qa-audits
plugins.description: Specialized quality audits: UX heuristics (Nielsen), security baseline (OWASP), accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA), performance perception, content & copy review. No documentation needed.
